user.title: PRE Distribuce – HDO
user.description: Select your HDO receiver command code. You can find it on the receiver label next to your meter (e.g. K1: 490) or in the Můj PRE portal.

data_description.cena_vt: Final price per kWh including distribution and VAT.
data_description.cena_nt: Final price per kWh including distribution and VAT.
data_description.power_sensor: If set, entities with current cost (CZK/h and CZK/min) are added.

abort.cannot_connect: Could not load the command list from the PREdistribuce website.
abort.already_configured: This command code is already configured.

data_description.periods: Comma-separated minutes, e.g. 30, 90, 180. Each creates a sensor that is on only while the low tariff will last at least that long – useful for starting appliances.
